summary: Clear, distant‑sounding recording that’s among the better sources available, but a modestly played show with no standout moments noted.
review: The archive upload is praised for its overall clarity and depth, even though the mix sounds a bit distant and one track (Crazy Fingers) is missing from the main files. Performance-wise reviewers find the set competent but not especially inspired. Technical hiccups with file organization detract slightly from an otherwise solid listening experience.

ai_rating.rationale: Show quality is judged average (≈3/5) while recording quality is regarded as good (≈4/5); weighted combination yields a mid‑range rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as clear with depth but distant‑sounding; noted missing track file for set 1, track 2 (Crazy Fingers) and a mixup in the archive files.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on pacing or flow; reviewers only mention overall competence of the performance.
